---
title: "Charles I"
---

## Charles I

**Dates:** (1600–1649)

### Description

King of England, Scotland and Ireland

### Biography

The Tractarians had a cult of Charles I, and CMY makes frequent reference to him in her works.

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 4th  [1901]
- Letter from April 10, 1872
- Letter from April 8, 1872
- Letter from Jan 30th [1867] 
- Letter from St. Peter’s Day [29 June], 1855.
- Letter from [1839]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
